title: Build property-based tests for the evaluation pipeline
description: Property tests P1-P10 (pipeline never panics, valid decision, assessment consistency, blocklist always denies, allowlist never denied, blocklist precedence, empty allows, policy monotonicity, glob idempotent, safe short-circuit). setupTestPipeline helper.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Implementation complete: commit 1bb9c72. All 11 property tests pass with -race. Ready for review.
